ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method used */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax applied to the order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES taxes ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account (hashed) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the item (price x quantity) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Rate for the shipping option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the shipping option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the shipping option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Rate of tax as a decimal value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tax rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tax rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sales data is for */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales for the day */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_address" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_address_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)
